comments.author: @WhereonEarth4K
comments.text:
👇 Everything we curated for this Libya episode. Tours, books, cookbooks, travel resources.

*📚 BROWSE THE LIBYA COLLECTION*
  ◦ Every book, cookbook, and cultural item we curated for this episode → https://amzn.to/4wUt5Ar

*🛍 SEE OUR FULL W.O.E. STOREFRONT*
  ◦ Every destination Collection in one place → https://www.amazon.com/shop/whereonearth

*🎟 TOURS AND EXPERIENCES IN LIBYA*
  ◦ Roman ruins, desert, and heritage tours in Libya → https://shorturl.at/pB36X
  ◦ Browse all Libya experiences → https://shorturl.at/9zszS

*📖 PLAN YOUR LIBYA TRIP*
  ◦ North Africa: The Roman Coast by Ethel Davies, the Bradt guide to Leptis Magna, Sabratha, Cyrene and Roman heritage across the region → https://amzn.to/43FGK0R

*📚 GO DEEPER INTO LIBYA*
  ◦ Sahara: The Extraordinary History of the World's Largest Desert by Marq de Villiers and Sheila Hirtle, covering the green Sahara, the ancient aquifers, and the Berber, Tuareg, and Tubu peoples who still call it home → https://amzn.to/4dRae0M
  ◦ The Return by Hisham Matar, the Pulitzer Prize winning memoir of a Libyan son's journey home after the fall of Gaddafi → https://amzn.to/42WHZZv

*🍲 BRING LIBYA HOME*
  ◦ North African Cookery by Arto der Haroutunian, 300+ recipes spanning Morocco, Algeria, Tunisia, and Libya, with notes on the region's distinctive soups and patisserie → https://amzn.to/4nXU8Hc
  ◦ African Rock Art: Paintings and Engravings on Stone by David Coulson and Alec Campbell, the definitive visual record of Saharan rock art including Libya's Acacus and Messak → https://amzn.to/49s0KHS

comments.author: @huseinturbi7140
comments.text: Why on earth you used a lot of misleading information? You included a lot of false facts and photage. As a Libyan, I know for sure that most of the modern cities, bazars, market places and wild animals you showed are not in Libya. Please check your sources and refresh you data base.

replies.author: @WhereonEarth4K
replies.text: A Libyan perspective on Libya always carries more detail than any production can. Thank you for watching and for sharing it.

comments.author: @sphelelentuli6390
comments.text: please don't mislead, you showed Cape Town, South Africa, as Libya. please don;t mislead, thanks

replies.text: That is a wonderful compliment, thank you for watching!
